name: Hister
description: Hister is a privacy-focused personal search engine that indexes the websites you visit via a browser extension. It stores your browsing history locally with full-text search, advanced query language, and optional semantic search.

notes.text: Install the Hister browser extension (Chrome or Firefox) and set the server URL to http://YOUR_IP:4433.
Search index and data are stored in /opt/hister/data. Disk usage grows as more pages are indexed.
